SEARCH

Uses of Annotation Interface
com.societegenerale.failover.annotations.Failover

Packages that use Failover
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.aspect
Spring AOP aspect that intercepts @Failover-annotated methods.
com.societegenerale.failover.core
Central failover handler and execution abstractions.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.exception
Exception model for method-level failover handling.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry
Expiry policy and extractor abstractions for controlling cached payload lifetime.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.key
Key generation for uniquely identifying cached failover entries.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.scanner
Scanner SPI for discovering @Failover-annotated methods.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload
Payload envelope, enrichment, and post-recovery handling.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.util
Internal utilities shared across the failover-core module.
com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience
Resilience4j integration for failover method execution.
com.societegenerale.failover.observable.scanner
Spring-native FailoverScanner implementation.

  • Uses of Failover in com.societegenerale.failover.aspect

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.aspect with parameters of type Failover
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    FailoverAspect.failoverAroundAdvice(org.aspectj.lang.ProceedingJoinPoint joinPoint, @Nullable Failover failover)
    Around advice applied to all methods annotated with Failover.

  • Uses of Failover in com.societegenerale.failover.core

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.core with parameters of type Failover
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Supplier<T>
    BasicFailoverExecution.decorateSupplier(Failover failover, Supplier<T> supplier, List<Object> args)
    Extension point for subclasses to wrap the supplier (e.g. to add context propagation).
    T
    BasicFailoverExecution.execute(Failover failover, Supplier<T> supplier, Method method, List<Object> args)
     
    T
    FailoverExecution.execute(Failover failover, Supplier<T> supplier, Method method, List<Object> args)
    Executes the given supplier with failover protection.
    T
    AdvancedFailoverHandler.recover(Failover failover, List<Object> args, Class<T> clazz, Throwable cause)
     
    @Nullable T
    DefaultFailoverHandler.recover(Failover failover, List<Object> args, Class<T> clazz, Throwable cause)
     
    T
    FailoverHandler.recover(Failover failover, List<Object> args, Class<T> clazz, Throwable throwable)
    Recovers a previously stored payload after a failure.
    @Nullable T
    ScatterGatherFailoverHandler.recover(Failover failover, List<Object> args, Class<T> clazz, Throwable cause)
    Recovers the composite payload via gather when payloadSplitter() is configured; otherwise delegates unchanged to delegateT.
    T
    AdvancedFailoverHandler.store(Failover failover, List<Object> args, T payload)
     
    T
    DefaultFailoverHandler.store(Failover failover, List<Object> args, T payload)
     
    T
    FailoverHandler.store(Failover failover, List<Object> args, T payload)
    Stores the payload for later recovery.
    T
    ScatterGatherFailoverHandler.store(Failover failover, List<Object> args, T payload)
    Stores payload via scatter when payloadSplitter() is configured; otherwise delegates unchanged to delegateT.

    DefaultExpiryPolicy.computeExpiry(Failover failover)

    ExpiryPolicy.computeExpiry(Failover failover)
    Computes the expiry instant for a payload stored under the given failover.

    FailoverExpiryPolicy.computeExpiry(Failover failover)
     
    long
    AbstractFailoverExpiryExtractor.expiryDuration(Failover failover)
     
    long
    FailoverExpiryExtractor.expiryDuration(Failover failover)
    Returns the expiry duration configured on the annotation.
    ChronoUnit
    AbstractFailoverExpiryExtractor.expiryUnit(Failover failover)
     
    ChronoUnit
    FailoverExpiryExtractor.expiryUnit(Failover failover)
    Returns the time unit for the expiry duration configured on the annotation.
    boolean
    DefaultExpiryPolicy.isExpired(Failover failover, ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
     
    boolean
    ExpiryPolicy.isExpired(Failover failover, ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Returns true if the stored payload has expired.
    boolean
    FailoverExpiryPolicy.isExpired(Failover failover, ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
     

  • Uses of Failover in com.societegenerale.failover.core.key

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.core.key with parameters of type Failover
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    DefaultKeyGenerator.key(Failover failover, List<Object> args)
    Generates a cache key by converting each argument to its string representation and joining all arguments with ":".
    String
    FailoverKeyGenerator.key(Failover failover, List<Object> args)
    Resolves the appropriate KeyGenerator and returns the final UUID key.
    String
    KeyGenerator.key(Failover failover, List<Object> args)
    Generates a raw cache key for the given failover call.

    FailoverScanner.findAllFailover()

    PayloadEnricher.enrichOnRecover(Failover failover, Class<T> clazz, ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload, Throwable cause)

    PayloadEnricher.enrichOnStore(Failover failover, Class<T> clazz, ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Enriches the payload before it is written to the failover store.

    Handles the recovered payload after a failover recovery attempt.
